name: LLM
summary: Run LLM completions (text + vision/OCR) and list models through llm:// URI routes.
description: LLM is an external urirun connector that runs chat completions, reads images (vision/OCR) and lists models as llm:// routes. Completions hit an external backend, so routes default to dry-run; pass --execute (or mode=execute). A bare model uses an Ollama-compatible endpoint; a provider-prefixed model (openrouter/..., openai/...) goes through litellm with the matching *_API_KEY. Pass image/images (file path, http(s) URL, data-URI or base64) to a vision model, or use the ocr route to extract text from an image.
useCases: Run an LLM completion as a step inside a URI flow.
OCR / read an image with a vision model (text, screenshots, scans).
List available models on a local or proxied backend.
Project LLM access to MCP/A2A so agents can call models through URIs.
